rules.description: English acute crisis response for UAE

action.response_text: I'm really concerned about what you've shared. Please reach out to a crisis line now — in the UAE: 800 4673 (800-HOPE), or emergency: 999. You don't have to face this alone.

rules.description: English extended crisis resources for proactive queries

action.response_text:
Here are crisis and mental health resources in the UAE:
- CDA Mental Health Support: 800-4888
- National Lifeline (Estijaba): 800-HOPE (800-4673)
- Emergency Services: 999
- Al Amal Psychiatric Hospital: in-person psychiatric support
- Lighthouse Arabia, Camali Clinic, American Center for Psychiatry and Neurology: therapy in Dubai

If you're in immediate danger, please call 999 or go to your nearest emergency room.

resources.name: American Center for Psychiatry and Neurology
